37.reason: The loop starts from k, but list3[k] is uninitialized; it should start from k-1 to avoid accessing out-of-bounds and uninitialized data.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 1.0 , reason:  The loop starts from k, but list3[k] is uninitialized; it should start from k-1 to avoid accessing out-of-bounds and uninitialized data.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  [The loop starts from p = k, but list3[k] is uninitialized (since k is the count of valid terms, indices 0 to k-1 are valid). This accesses list3[k] which is out of bounds, causing undefined behavior. Should be p = k - 1.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  Accessing list3[k] which is uninitialized; should be p = k-1 to avoid out-of-bounds. Also, when k==0, loop runs with p=0 accessing uninitialized list3[0].
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: Loop starts at index k, which is one past the last existing term. This accesses uninitialized list3[k] and also does not search the valid existing terms (indices 0..k-1). The correct loop should iterate from 0 to k-1 to find a matching power.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Error] The loop should start from k-1 instead of k. Starting at k accesses list3[k], which is uninitialized (defaults to 0), causing incorrect matching for terms with exponent 0 and logical errors in term merging.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  The loop should iterate from k-1 down to 0. Starting at k checks an uninitialized/zero-initialized element, which causes incorrect matches when powplus is 0 and leads to logical errors or infinite loops.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Loop condition should be p >= 0 but list3[k] is uninitialized when p == k; also, loop starts from k which is out of current valid range (valid indices are 0 to k-1). This causes reading uninitialized memory and potential incorrect merging.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Loop condition should be p >= 0 but list3 is only valid from index 0 to k-1; accessing list3[k] is out of bounds. Also, loop starts at k which is beyond the current filled range.]

60.reason: [Error: Should only output terms with non-zero coefficient to match the required output format (as in the reference program).]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: Should only output terms with non-zero coefficient to match the required output format (as in the reference program).]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  Missing condition to skip terms with zero coefficients. Polynomial multiplication can result in zero coefficients due to term cancellation, which should not be printed.
